claim_shape: (Currently Amended) A non-transitory, computer-readable storage medium storing instructions for evaluating responses generated by one or more artificial intelligence (Al ) models, wherein the instructions when executed by at least one data processor of a system, cause the system to: train a machine learning (ML) model on a training dataset including a set of attributes to, in response to an input, generate an output that identifies a presence of one or more certain patterns of the set of attributes in the input, wherein each certain pattern represents a disproportionate association of one or more attributes of the set of attributes within the input; for each certain pattern, using the trained ML model, construct a set of validation actions for a set of responses generated by an Al model,wherein each validation action includes: (1) a test command set, (2) an expected result, and (3) an expected set of descriptors associated with an expected series of steps to generate the expected result, and wherein the set of validation actions is constructed by: (1) determining a set of specific use cases associated with a set of guidelines defining a set of operative boundaries of the Al model, and (2) mapping the set of specific use cases to the set of validation actions; using the trained ML model, execute each set of validation actions on the Al model to determine the presence of one or more certain patterns within the set of responses generated by the Al model by:inputting, into the Al model, the test command set of each validation action to receive a first test output comprising (1) a set of test results and (2) a set of test descriptors associated with a second series of steps to generate the set of test results, SVG 19015646.05-14-2025.MAOTG2Z2WFYGX53.CLM.2.1.2205.159.2247.190.svg 0.103 0.14 Chemistry Black and white comparing, for each validation action, (1) the set of test results and (2) the set of test descriptors of the Al model with (1) the expected result and (2) the expected set of descriptors of a corresponding validation action, respectively, and aggregating the comparisons of each validation action to generate a result indicating the presence of one or more certain patterns within the first test output generated by the Al model; using the result, generate a set of corrective actions to remove a portion of the first test output generated by [[ from ]E the Al model indicated by the one or more certain patterns; {[ and]h p resenting a rep resentation including one or more of: a grap hical user interface comp onent or a set of text via a comp uting device, wherein the rep resentation indicates at least one of: the result or the set of corrective actions; resp onsive to a user inp ut received via the comp uting device, automatically executing the set of corrective actions to remove the portion of the first test outp ut generated by the Al model; and transmit the test command set of one or more validation actions into one or more nodes of an inp ut lay er of the Al model to validate an absence of the one or more certain p atterns within a second test outp ut generated by the Al modeldisplay, on a graphical user interface (GUI), a graphical layout including (1) a first graphical representation indicating the result and (2) a second graphical representation indicating the constructed set of validation actions, or (3) a third graphical representation indicating the generated set of corrective actions. remedy: Examiner's ground: Claims 1-7 are rejected under 35 U.S.C. 112(b) or 35 U.S.C. 112 (pre-AIA), second paragraph, as being indefinite for failing to particularly point out and distinctly claim the subject matter which the inventor or a joint inventor (or for applications subject to pre-AIA 35 U.S.C. 112, the applicant), regards as the invention.
